pr.title: Team titles: Colin → Lead Software Engineer, Jarred → Head of Product
pr.body: ## Summary Rename team titles across the data room: - **Colin Zhang**: Software Engineer / Senior Software Engineer → **Lead Backend Engineer** - **Jarred Gou**: Chief Product Officer (CPO) → **Head of Product** Touched files: - `src/data/sections.ts` (Team blurb) - `src/content/dataroom/06-team--founder-bio-stephan-claxton.md` - `src/content/dataroom/06-team--hiring-plan.md` (reconciled the post-Series-A "head of product" line so it no longer contradicts Jarred's new title) - `src/content/dataroom/01-company-overview--company-overview.md` - `src/content/dataroom/01-company-overview--executive-one-pager.md` - `src/content/dataroom/01-company-overview--fundraising-memo.md` - `src/content/dataroom/02-pitch-deck--pitch-deck.md` - `src/content/dataroom/04-technical-architecture--architecture-vision-memo.md` - `src/content/dataroom/07-traction--execution-velocity.md` - `src/content/dataroom/08-legal--ip-assignment-index.md` - `src/content/dataroom/10-appendix--investor-qa.md` ## Verification - `npm run build`
pr.author: PilotSHC
